message:
feat(share): add static HTML export engine and CLI command (br-3vwi.13.5)

Add deterministic static HTML export pipeline that enumerates all
projects/agents/threads/messages from DB, renders pre-rendered HTML via
web UI dispatcher, and emits navigation manifest, client-side search index,
and hosting files (.nojekyll, _headers, redirect.html) with SHA-256
content hashes. Wire up `share static-export` CLI subcommand with
--output, --project, --include-archive, and --include-search-index flags.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
